runtime_loop_candidates.label: mDNS discovery
runtime_loop_candidates.note: All mDNS discovery toggles are off.

runtime_loop_candidates.label: Clipboard polling
runtime_loop_candidates.note: Clipboard polling is off because MUSU_ENABLE_CLIPBOARD_SYNC is not set.

runtime_loop_candidates.label: Cloud heartbeat
runtime_loop_candidates.note: Account login is present, so cloud registration can heartbeat at 300s.

runtime_loop_candidates.label: File sync/watch
runtime_loop_candidates.note: No shared roots are configured, so file watcher/sync stays off.

runtime_loop_candidates.label: Relay target polling
runtime_loop_candidates.note: Relay target polling is active at 60s with empty backoff capped at 300s.

runtime_loop_candidates.label: Autonomous planner
runtime_loop_candidates.note: Planner is off because MUSU_ENABLE_PLANNER is not set.

runtime_loop_candidates.label: Health check retry
runtime_loop_candidates.note: Health check retry stays off until update.toml enables a source and `musu auto-update --supervise` is launched.

runtime_loop_candidates.label: Auto-update supervisor
runtime_loop_candidates.note: update.toml is absent, so auto-update supervision stays off.

runtime_loop_candidates.label: Bridge readiness wait
runtime_loop_candidates.note: CLI bridge readiness waits only run during commands like `musu up`/`musu bridge`, using bounded 250-2000ms backoff until the caller timeout expires.

runtime_loop_candidates.label: Log/telemetry flush
runtime_loop_candidates.note: Telemetry/log flush primitives are limited to explicit one-shot CLI/reporting surfaces; no background flush worker is expected.

route_probe.route_explain_stdout:
{
  "schema": "musu.route_explain.v1",
  "version": "1.15.0-rc.22",
  "requested_target": "hugh-main",
  "channel": "cli",
  "needs_gpu": false,
  "submission_endpoint": "http://192.168.1.192:4387/api/tasks/delegate",
  "selected_candidate": {
    "name": "hugh-main",
    "addr": "192.168.1.192:4387",
    "source": "cache",
    "route_kind": "lan",
    "transport_scheme": "http",
    "peer_identity_verified": false,
    "peer_identity_method": "advertised_tls_cert_fingerprint_unverified",
    "peer_public_key_present": true,
    "https_fingerprint_pin_available": false,
    "encryption": "none_http_bearer",
    "payload_transited_musu_infra": false
  },
  "candidate_count": 2,
  "current_transport": "http_bearer",
  "bridge_path_selection_wired": true,
  "rendezvous_session_wired": true,
  "https_fingerprint_pinning_wired": true,
  "release_grade_transport_required": "quic_tls_1_3",
  "route_evidence_ready": false,
  "release_blockers": [
    "peer_identity_verified=false for current manual/local HTTP route",
    "bridge HTTPS fingerprint pinning is not release-grade QUIC/TLS route proof",
    "route evidence is not release-grade until the runtime route attempt records quic_tls_1_3",
    "rendezvous target-candidate-assisted routing still needs real second-PC evidence",
    "relay/tunnel fallback transport is not wired"
  ],
  "path_priority": [
    "lan",
    "tailscale",
    "direct_quic",
    "relay"
  ],
  "relay_policy": "relay is Connect/Pro fallback only; it must not become the default data path"
}

bridge HTTPS fingerprint pinning is not release-grade QUIC/TLS route proof

relay/tunnel fallback transport is not wired
route_explain.relay_policy: relay is Connect/Pro fallback only; it must not become the default data path

route_attempt_evidence.note: Actual CLI route attempt evidence. HTTPS peers with advertised sha256 certificate fingerprints are recorded only after a fingerprint-pinned request succeeds; HTTP and advertised-only metadata remain non-release-grade until QUIC/TLS proof is wired.

preparation.note: Samples immediately after packaged app activation to catch startup busy-loop regressions.

dashboard.note: Packaged local runtime does not require a workspace dashboard; web input should arrive through MUSU.PRO or another connected operator surface.

preparation.note: DashboardUrl not supplied or discovered; measured current runtime state only.
